ai_summary: **Executive Summary: Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL) Q1 FY2022 Earnings**  Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL) reported significant financial improvement in Q1 FY22, reducing net losses by 50% and growing revenue by 44% year-over-year, despite pandemic-related disruptions. The company is aggressively pursuing diversification into non-power sectors like nuclear, urban rail, and defense, securing substantial new orders while focusing on cost optimization. However, BHEL remains unprofitable, with gross margins depressed by surging metal prices and an evolving business mix, posing an ongoing challenge despite improved cash management and receivable quality.
